sequenceDiagram
    par fetch A
        A->>B: get
    and fetch C
        A->>C: get
    end
---
+---+     +---+     +---+
| A |     | B |     | C |
+-+-+     +-+-+     +-+-+
+-[par fetch A]---------+
| |         |         | |
| | get     |         | |
| +-------->|         | |
+.[fetch C].............+
| |         |         | |
| | get     |         | |
| +------------------>| |
| |         |         | |
+-----------------------+
  |         |         |
